subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Kitab-i-Sidq
subcodes.first_line: The Book of Truth hath been sent down in truth from the presence of One Who is All-Knowing, All-Informed. Verily, it is the Messenger of Truth unto all lands, that it may remind the peoples [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الصدق نزل بالحق من لدن عالم خبیر انه لرسول الصدق الی البلاد لیذکر الناس
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @Manifestation of God as sun
